  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Lockout device applied without an accompanying tagout device, or tagout device applied without a lockout device, violating the dual-protection sequence."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work on the affected equipment immediately.",
    "Apply both a compliant lock and an information tag to the energy isolating device before any work or exposure continues."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.147, lockout/tagout requires both the physical lockout device to hold the energy isolating device in a safe position and a highly visible warning tag to identify the authorized employee. Having one without the other is a critical safety violation that fails sequence and compliance checks.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(6)"
  ]
}
